settings.geoNotSupported: Kuyika malo sikutheka ndi msakatuli wanu
settings.geoFailed: Sitinathe kudziwa malo. Onani kuti GPS/Wi-Fi ndiyoyatsidwa.
settings.geoTimeout: Kuzindikira malo kwatha. Yesani pamalo otseguka.
settings.fileTooLarge: Fayilo yayikulu kwambiri. Kuchuluka kwa 2 MB.
settings.ttlPrompt: Kodi akaunti iyenera kuchotsedwa patatha masiku angati osagwira ntchito?
settings.sqQuestion1: Kodi dzina lakutchulidwira kuti banja lanu lokha limakutchani uli mwana?
settings.sqQuestion2: Kodi dzina la msewu umene munkakhalamo unali chiyani pamene unali ndi zaka 10?
settings.sqQuestion3: Ndi mbale iti yomwe munaphunzira kuphika nokha?
settings.sqSetupDesc: Mukayiwala mawu anu achinsinsi, mutha kupezanso mwayi poyankha mafunso atatu. Mutha kugwiritsa ntchito mafunso anu kapena osakhazikika.
settings.sqFillAll: Chonde lembani mafunso ndi mayankho onse
settings.pwReminderDesc: Chekeni pamwezi - onetsetsani kuti mukukumbukira mawu anu achinsinsi olowera.
settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Tikukulimbikitsani kuti musinthe mawu anu achinsinsi mukamalowa, kuti musataye mwayi wofikira.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:
Chotsani cache ya media ndi data yosakhalitsa?

Makiyi achinsinsi ndi zosintha sizidzachotsedwa.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Gawo liyenera kukhala logwira kwa masiku osachepera 7 kuti musinthe mawu achinsinsi.

Nthawi yotsala: {daysLeft} masiku.
settings.waitDaysWarning: Masiku 7 sanadutse. Chonde dikirani {daysLeft} masiku ochulukirapo.
settings.geoDeniedMac:
Saloledwa kulowa m'malo mwamalo.

1. macOS: Zokonda pa System → Zazinsinsi → Ntchito Zamalo → yambitsani osatsegula
2. Msakatuli: dinani chizindikiro cha loko mu bar ya adilesi → Malo → Lolani
3. Kwezaninso tsambali
settings.geoDeniedOther:
Saloledwa kulowa m'malo mwamalo.

Dinani chizindikiro cha loko mu bar ya adilesi → Malo → Lolani, kenako tsegulaninso tsambalo

about.description: Mthenga wa P2P wogawidwa ndi E2E encryption

privacy.title: Zazinsinsi
privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Kiyi yatsopano yachipinda ikalandiridwa - tumizani zokha ku zida zanu zonse (E2E encrypted)
privacy.historySyncHint: Mauthenga obisika akupezeka pazida zonse. Seva imawona phokoso lokha
privacy.crossSignHint: Tsimikizirani zida zatsopano pogwiritsa ntchito siginecha ya HMAC (chitetezo kuti musalowe m'malo)
privacy.backupHint: Lembani makiyi onse ndi mawu achinsinsi ndikusunga ku seva. Pakusintha kwa chipangizo - bwezeretsani ndi mawu amodzi.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Tumizani makiyi ku chipangizo chatsopano kudzera pa khodi ya manambala 6. Makiyi amasungidwa ndi ECIES - seva singathe kuwawerenga.
privacy.ssssHint: Gawani kiyi ya master mu magawo a N pogwiritsa ntchito chiwembu cha Shamir. Zigawo zilizonse za M zidzabwezeretsa kiyi. Chigawo chilichonse chimasungidwa kwa munthu wina wodalirika (ECIES). Seva imawona mabulogu obisika okha.
privacy.federatedHint: Gawani zosunga zobwezeretsera zosungidwa m'malo onse a federal (Shamir scheme). Ngakhale seva itatayika - kuchira kudzera mwa anzawo.
privacy.ktHint: Cholemba chowonjezera chokha cha zosintha zonse zapagulu ndi unyolo wa hashi (Merkle). Seva imasainira kulowa kulikonse - zabodza zimazindikirika pakuwunika.

panic.desc: Zonse zomwe zili pa node iyi zidzachotsedwa kwamuyaya. Izi sizingasinthidwe.
panic.callSettingsNote: Zindikirani: Kukakamiza TCP ndi Relay modes zitha kukulitsa latency koma zimapereka zinsinsi zambiri. Kuphimba magalimoto kumawonjezera padding mwachisawawa ku magawo a SDP kuti alepheretse kusanthula kwa metadata.
panic.warningBody:
Mwatsala pang'ono kuwonongeratu data yonse.
Zochitazi sizingathetsedwe.

fingerprint.title: Kutsimikizira kofunikira
fingerprint.keyChanged: Kiyi yachitetezo cha munthu ameneyu yasintha
fingerprint.emojiHint: Onse awiri ayenera kuwona emoji yomweyo. Yerekezerani nokha kapena panjira yotetezeka.
fingerprint.showQR: Onetsani khodi ya QR kuti winayo asike
fingerprint.aimCamera: Yang'anani kamera pa QR code ya munthu winayo
fingerprint.pointCamera: Lozani kamera pa QR code ya munthu winayo
fingerprint.keysMismatch: Makiyi sakufanana! Kuwukira kotheka kwa MITM.

keyBackup.passphraseMinLen: Mawu achinsinsi akuyenera kukhala osachepera zilembo 8
keyBackup.keysRestored: Makiyi abwezeretsedwa kuchokera ku zosunga zobwezeretsera
keyBackup.enterCodeOnMain: Lowetsani khodi iyi pa chipangizo chanu chachikulu
keyBackup.passphraseEncryptHint: Lowetsani mawu achinsinsi kuti mubisike. Kumbukirani - kuchira popanda sizingatheke.
keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Lowetsani mawu achinsinsi omwe mudagwiritsa ntchito popanga zosunga zobwezeretsera.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Chotsani makiyi osunga zobwezeretsera? Izi sizingasinthe.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Chotsani makiyi onse? Kuchira kudzera mwa omwe mumawadalira sikutheka.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Makiyi anu ambuye agawidwa m'magawo a N pogwiritsa ntchito Shamir scheme. Magawo aliwonse a M adzalola kuchira kofunikira. Gawo lililonse limabisidwa kwa munthu wina wodalirika.
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Osachepera 2 anzako omwe ali ndi kubisa akufunika
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: Chotsani zosunga zobwezeretsera za federal? Ma shards pa anzawo adzakhalapo, koma metadata idzatayika.

botConstructor.title: Bot Constructor
botConstructor.subtitle: Pangani bot yanu mowoneka - palibe code yofunikira
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Uthenga wolandiridwa pamene wosuta ayambitsa bot...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Takulandirani! Ndine bot wanu. Gwiritsani ntchito / thandizo kuti muwone malamulo.
botConstructor.defaultHelp:
Malamulo omwe alipo:
/thandizo - Onetsani uthenga uwu
botConstructor.notifyOnEvent: Zimayambitsidwa pamene wogwiritsa ntchito atumiza uthenga
botConstructor.docsCommand: Imayankha wogwiritsa ntchito akatumiza lamulo linalake (monga /help, /start). Mutha kuwonjezera masitepe a zokambirana kuti mupange zokambirana zamasitepe ambiri.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Imayankha uthenga wogwiritsa ntchito ukafanana ndi pateni. Amagwiritsa ntchito regex - mwachitsanzo. "hello|hi" ikugwirizana ndi mawu onse awiri. Mlandu-wopanda chidwi.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Ogwiritsa ntchito uthenga woyamba amawona akayamba bot ndi /kuyamba. Bot iliyonse iyenera kukhala ndi imodzi.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Zimatumiza uthenga zokha panthawi yake. Zabwino kwa zikumbutso za tsiku ndi tsiku, kugawanika kwa sabata, kapena kulengeza nthawi ndi nthawi.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Nthambi za bot logic. Yang'anani zosintha kapena za ogwiritsa ndikuyankha mosiyana kutengera zotsatira.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot imasankha yankho limodzi mwachisawawa pamndandanda. Zabwino pa nthabwala, maupangiri, moni, kapena mayankho osiyanasiyana.
botConstructor.docsApi: Amapanga pempho la HTTP ku API yakunja ndipo amagwiritsa ntchito yankho mu uthenga wa bot. Gwiritsani ntchito {data.field} kutengera mayankho.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Imatumiza chidziwitso kwa woyang'anira chipinda ikayatsidwa. Zothandiza pazidziwitso, zidziwitso za ogwiritsa ntchito atsopano, kapena kuwongolera.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Onjezani masitepe ku block block kuti mupange zokambirana. Gawo lililonse limafunsa funso, kudikirira kuti wogwiritsa ntchitoyo ayankhe, ndikulisunga kukusintha. Gwiritsani ntchito zosinthika pomaliza ndi {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Gwiritsani ntchito zingwe zopindika {variable} poyankha kuti muyike zosinthika. Zosintha za boma zimapitilirabe mauthenga.
botConstructor.docsVarIsAdmin: Zowona ngati wogwiritsa ntchito ndi admin/mwini
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: Mutha kugwiritsa ntchito masanjidwe ngati HTML pamayankho:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Yambani ndi block block - ndicho chinthu choyamba ogwiritsa ntchito kuwona
botConstructor.docsTip2: Onjezani lamulo la /help lomwe limalemba malamulo onse omwe alipo
botConstructor.docsTip3: Gwiritsani ntchito njira zoyankhulirana polembetsa, kufufuza, kapena kusonkhanitsa deta
botConstructor.docsTip4: Phatikizani midadada ya Condition yokhala ndi zosinthika zamanthambi anzeru
botConstructor.docsTip5: Yesani bot yanu polankhula nayo m'chipinda mutatha kutumiza

gravitixDocs.title: Gravitix Chiyankhulo cha Chiyankhulo
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Chilankhulo cholemba bwino kwambiri chomangira bots. 96 mawonekedwe. Dzimbiri kumbuyo.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix ndi chiyankhulo chachindunji (DSL) chopangidwa kuchokera pansi mpaka polemba ma Vortex bots. Kumene zilankhulo zina zimafuna malaibulale, ma callbacks, ndi boilerplate, Gravitix imakupatsirani zowongolera zochitika, mayendedwe amakambirano, komanso zomangika - zonse m'mawu oyera, owerengeka owuziridwa ndi Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Zowerengeka - khodi imawerengedwa ngati cholinga, osati makina
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Safe - mitundu yokhazikika imagwira zolakwika nthawi isanakwane
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Zowoneka bwino - zoyenda, alonda, ndi mafananidwe amapangidwe amamangidwa
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Zochepa - palibe makalasi, palibe cholowa, palibe ndondomeko yoti muphunzire
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix ndi ya aliyense amene akufuna kupanga Vortex bot mwachangu - kaya simunalembepo kachidindo, kapena ndinu katswiri wodziwa ntchito yemwe watopa ndi Python boilerplate. Bukuli limaphunzitsa Gravitix kuchokera ku mfundo zoyambirira: palibe chidziwitso choyambirira chofunikira.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Gawo lirilonse limamanga pa zam'mbuyo. Ngati ndinu watsopano ku mapulogalamu, werengani kuchokera pamwamba mpaka pansi. Ngati mumadziwa kale chinenero china, gwiritsani ntchito mndandanda wa zomwe zili mkati kuti mudumphire pazomwe zimakukondani.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Njira yothamanga kwambiri kuchokera ku zero kupita ku bot.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: pa /kuyamba {... } - imatanthawuza chothandizira chomwe chimayenda pamene wogwiritsa ntchito atumiza /kuyamba. emit "..." - imatumiza uthenga kwa wogwiritsa ntchito. {ctx.first_name} - imamasulira dzina loyamba la wosuta mu chingwe.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Mu Gravitix IDE, dinani Thamangani batani mu bar pamwamba. Lowetsani Chizindikiro chanu cha Vortex Bot mukafunsidwa. Bot imayamba nthawi yomweyo - palibe sitepe yomanga yofunika.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Pulogalamu iliyonse ya Gravitix imapangidwa kuchokera ku midadada itatu yomanga: othandizira, mawu otulutsa, ndi malingaliro.
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Mtengo uliwonse mu Gravitix uli ndi mtundu wake. Mtundu wamtunduwu ndi wosasunthika: mitundu imawunikidwa panthawi yophatikiza, bot yanu isanayambe.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Othandizira amaphatikiza mfundo kuti apange zatsopano.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Zingwe mu Gravitix ndizolemba za UTF-8. Amathandizira kutanthauzira kolemera komanso mndandanda wazinthu zomangidwira.
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Fananizani mtengo motsutsana ndi mapatani angapo. Ganizirani izi ngati mawu osinthira amphamvu.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Ntchito ndi midadada reusable wa code. Amakuthandizani kuti musabwereze kubwereza komanso kupanga code kukhala yosavuta kumvetsetsa.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Handlers ndiye mtima wa Gravitix bot. Wothandizira aliyense amamvetsera mtundu wina wa chochitika ndipo amathamanga chochitikacho chikachitika.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Alonda amakulolani kuti muwonjezere chikhalidwe kwa wothandizira. Wogwira ntchitoyo amangothamanga ngati mlonda akuwunika kuti ndi zoona.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Chinthu cha ctx chimapezeka mosavuta mkati mwa aliyense wogwira ntchito. Lili ndi zambiri zokhudza uthenga wamakono komanso wogwiritsa ntchito amene watumiza.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: State imalola bot yanu kukumbukira zinthu pakati pa mauthenga. Popanda boma, uthenga uliwonse ndi wodziyimira pawokha ndipo bot ilibe kukumbukira.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Mayendedwe amakulolani kuti mulembe zokambirana zamasitepe angapo motsata mzere, mawonekedwe owerengeka. Kuthamanga kumatha kuyimitsa ndikudikirira uthenga wotsatira wa wogwiritsa ntchito.
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Kutumiza mauthenga ndiko kutulutsa koyambirira kwa bot.
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Thamangani khodi mokhazikika pa ndandanda - palibe ntchito za cron, osafunikira ntchito zakunja.
gravitixDocs.atSpecificTime: pa - kuthamanga pa nthawi yeniyeni ya tsiku
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Woyendetsa chitoliro |> amadutsa mtengo ngati mkangano woyamba ku ntchito yotsatira. Zimapangitsa kuti maunyolo aziwerengeka, kuchokera kumanzere kupita kumanja.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix imapereka kuwongolera zolakwika ndikuyesa / kugwira / pomaliza kutsekereza.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Mapangidwe amakulolani kuti mugawane deta yokhudzana ndi mtundu womwe watchulidwa. Enums amatanthauzira mitundu yotsekedwa.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix imatumiza laibulale yamasamu yathunthu yokhala ndi ~180 ntchito.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix ili ndi mtundu wovuta wachilengedwe - zoyandama za 64-bit zomwe zimayimira magawo enieni komanso ongoyerekeza.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix imaphatikizanso mawerengedwe a manambala: zotengera ndi zophatikizika zomwe zimawerengedwa pa ntchito zosagwirizana.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Linear algebra ndi masamu a ma vectors ndi matrices.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Chiphunzitso cha manambala chimaphunzira za ma integers. Maziko a cryptography yamakono.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Ziwerengero zimapereka zida zofotokozera, kusanthula, ndi kuzindikira zomwe zili mu data.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Ntchito zapadera ndi njira zothetsera ma equation ofunikira.
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Kusintha kwa Fourier kumawola chizindikiro mumayendedwe ake.
gravitixDocs.bp3: Gwiritsani ntchito alonda m'malo mwa unyolo ngati zilolezo
gravitixDocs.bp5: Gwiritsani ntchito kubwerera mwamsanga kuti muchepetse zisa
gravitixDocs.bp8: Gwiritsani ntchito state kuti mupewe spam
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Njira yabwino yophunzirira Gravitix ndikumanga. Yambani ndi echo bot yosavuta, kenaka yonjezerani dziko, kenaka yonjezerani maulendo. Lingaliro lililonse latsopano lomwe mumaphunzira limatsegula mwayi wochulukirapo.

bestpractices.h3: 3. Gwiritsani ntchito guards m'malo mwa if-chain kuti mulole
bestpractices.h5: 5. Gwiritsani ntchito msanga return kuti muchepetse zisa
bestpractices.p1: Mapangidwe ndi zizolowezi zomwe zimapangitsa Gravitix bots yanu kukhala yodalirika, yowerengeka, komanso yosasinthika.
bestpractices.p2: Bot iliyonse iyenera kukhala ndi chowongolera on msg kuti ogwiritsa ntchito azipeza yankho nthawi zonse:
bestpractices.p3: Musaganize kuti zomwe wogwiritsa ntchito watumiza ndizovomerezeka:
bestpractices.p4: Ogwira ntchito azikhala aafupi. Sunthani malingaliro ovuta kuzinthu zotchulidwa:
bestpractices.p6: Njira yabwino yophunzirira Gravitix ndikumanga. Yambani ndi simple echo bot, kenaka onjezani state, kenako onjezani flows. Lingaliro lililonse latsopano lomwe mumaphunzira limatsegula mwayi wochulukirapo.

bitwise.cc5: Mbendera za chilolezo - chidutswa chilichonse ndi chilolezo
bitwise.cc7: Kuchulukitsa mwachangu / gawani ndi mphamvu ya 2
bitwise.p1: Ogwiritsa ntchito Bitwise amagwira ntchito molunjika pakuyimilira kwa binary kwa manambala. Nambala iliyonse ndi mtengo wosainidwa wa 64-bit; bitwise ops amachitenga ngati 64 bits.

builtins.cc5: kusindikiza / chipika kuvomereza mikangano ingapo yamtundu uliwonse:
builtins.p1: Gravitix imaphatikizapo laibulale yolemera kwambiri. Ntchito zonse zomangidwira zimapezeka nthawi zonse - palibe zolowa kunja zomwe zimafunikira.
builtins.p2: Imalembanso mawu olumikizirana ndi njira zoyitanira kuwonjezera pa ntchito zoyimirira:
builtins.p3: Werengani mfundo zochokera m'malo a OS — zothandiza zinsinsi monga API makiyi:
builtins.p4: Osalemba API makiyi kapena ma tokeni mwachindunji mufayilo yanu .grav. Gwiritsani ntchito env("KEY_NAME") ndikukhazikitsa zosinthika m'malo omwe mumatumizira.
builtins.p5: Ntchito izi zimasindikizidwa ku seva ya seva - yosawoneka kwa ogwiritsa ntchito, yothandiza pakukula:
builtins.td29: Sinthani kukhala chiwerengero chokwanira (mafupipafupi float, magawo str)
builtins.td33: Nambala yamtundu wokhala ndi zolekanitsa zikwi (1000 → "1,000")
builtins.td34: Chingwe chakumanzere kupita m'lifupi mwake (chingwe chokhazikika cha pad ndi danga)
builtins.td41: Lowani nawo zinthu zonse ndi olekanitsa
builtins.td47: Bweretsani dzina la mtunduwo ngati chingwe
builtins.td56: Nthawi yapano ngati sitampu ya Unix (masekondi)
builtins.td57: Nthawi yapano ngati chingwe chowerengeka ndi anthu UTC

complex_type.cc3: zenizeni=0, chithunzi=5 (int mawu omangika akugwiranso ntchito)
complex_type.cc6: Polar mawonekedwe: kuyimira z ndi kukula ndi ngodya
complex_type.cc8: Mizu yayikulu yayikulu ya −1 ndi i
complex_type.ct1: 🌀 Chifukwa chiyani manambala ovuta m'chilankhulo cha bot?
complex_type.li5: Mphamvu: z**n amagwiritsa ntchito njira ya De Moivre ya nambala n
complex_type.p1: Nambala yovuta ili ndi mawonekedwe a + bi, pomwe a ndi gawo lenileni ndipo b ndi gawo lolingalira. i ndi gawo longoyerekeza lofotokozedwa ndi i² = −1. Manambala ovuta amakulitsa mzere weniweni kundege, kulola mayankho ku ma equation ngati x² + 1 = 0 omwe alibe yankho lenileni.
complex_type.p2: Mu Gravitix mumalemba mawu ongoyerekeza ndi i:
complex_type.p3: Ntchito zonse zinayi zoyambira zimagwira ntchito pazikhalidwe zovuta mwachindunji. Gravitix amatsatira malamulo osavuta a masamu:
complex_type.p4: Kukonza ma Signal (kusanthula kwamawu, FFT), fractal generation (Mandelbrot set), mafanizidwe a fizikisi, kuwerengera kwamagetsi, ndi computing ya quantum zonse zimafuna masamu ovuta. Gravitix imakupatsani mwayi wowerengera izi mkati mwa Vortex bot wopanda malaibulale akunja.
complex_type.td12: Kukangana (ngodya mu ma radian): atan2(b, a)
complex_type.td14: Kuchokera ku polar: r·e^(iθ) = r·cos θ + ir·sin θ
complex_type.td2: Construct kuchokera ku ma float awiri
complex_type.td24: Ma trig ntchito amafikira ku ndege zovuta

ctx.td14: Zowona ngati wotumiza ndi akaunti ya bot
ctx.td16: Zowona ngati wogwiritsa ntchito ndi gulu la admin
ctx.td18: Zowona ngati wogwiritsa ali ndi Vortex Premium
ctx.td26: Zowona ngati ndi macheza a gulu
ctx.td34: Zowona ngati uthenga uli ndi chithunzi
ctx.td36: Zowona ngati uthenga uli ndi mawu omvera
ctx.td38: Zowona ngati uthenga uli ndi kanema
ctx.td40: Zowona ngati uthenga uli ndi fayilo
ctx.td42: Mawu omasulira pazama media (atha kukhala null)
ctx.td6: Dzina lomaliza la ogwiritsa (akhoza kukhala null)

emit.cc2: Gwiritsani ntchito emoji kuti mukope chidwi
emit.p1: Tumizani uthenga kwa aliyense wogwiritsa ntchito ndi ID (yothandiza pa ntchito zomwe zakonzedwa kapena kuwulutsa kwa admin):

error.p1: Manga khodi iliyonse yomwe ingalephereke mu block try. Ngati cholakwika ndi thrown - mwina ndi Gravitix nthawi yothamanga kapena momveka bwino ndi code yanu - kudumphira mpaka pa catch block. Mtengo womwe wagwidwa umagwirizana ndi zomwe mwatchula catch.
error.p2: finally imayenda mopanda malire - kaya try yapambana kapena catch yathetsa vuto. Gwiritsani ntchito kumasula zothandizira, kulemba, kapena kutumiza uthenga womaliza.
error.p3: Gwiritsani ntchito kuwongolera zolakwika pamachitidwe omwe amadalira kulowetsa kwakunja: kuyika mawu a ogwiritsa ntchito, kuyimba ma API, zosintha zamalo owerengera, kapena kupanga masamu ovuta pomwe zolakwika za domain (sqrt of negative, log of zero) ndizotheka. Pazolakwa zamalingaliro amkati, sankhani guard ndime zoyambira returns.

examples.cc5: Pangani chingwe cha mbiri ya simple CSV
examples.p1: Mabotolo athunthu, ogwirira ntchito owonetsa machitidwe ofanana.
examples.p2: The simplest bot yothandiza - imabwereza every zomwe wogwiritsa ntchito akunena.
examples.p3: Botolo la simple lomwe limawerengera kusindikiza mabatani pa wogwiritsa ntchito aliyense.
examples.p4: Mafunso osankha angapo okhala ndi zigoli.
examples.p5: Woyang'anira ntchito payekha pa wogwiritsa ntchito.
examples.p6: Imasonkhanitsa mbiri ya ogwiritsa ntchito pokambirana.

flows.cc1: imayimitsa apa, iyambiranso pamene wogwiritsa ayankha
flows.p2: wait imayimitsa zomwe zilipo flow mpaka zomwe zanenedwazo zitachitika. Mtengo wa chochitikacho ndi returned:
flows.p3: flow ikagunda wait, imasunga masinthidwe ake onse am'deralo ndikuyimitsa. Wogwiritsa ntchito akatumiza uthenga wotsatira, flow imayambiranso ndendende pomwe idasiyira. Izi zimachitika mowonekera - mumangolemba mzere wa mzere.

functions.cc1: kuyimba moni, ayi return mtengo wogwiritsidwa ntchito
functions.p2: Pereka deta mu ntchito yokhala ndi magawo (dzina: mtundu):
functions.p3: Nenani mtundu wa return pambuyo pa -> ndikugwiritsa ntchito return:
functions.p4: Gwiritsani ntchito mabatani aang'ono amitundu yodziwika mu magawo:
functions.p5: Ntchito ikhoza kuyitcha self (mosamala kuti avoid kubwereza kosatha):
functions.p6: Nthawi yothamanga imakakamiza kuyimba kozama kwambiri (nthawi zambiri 200) kuti tipewe kuchulukana kupitiriraflows.

guard.h4: Ma guard angapo pa lamulo lomwelo
guard.p1: Ngati wosuta si woyang'anira, woyamba guard walephera, ndipo Gravitix amagwera kwa wogwirizira wachiwiri.
guard.p2: Nthawi zonse perekani chothandizira chobwerera popanda guard chothana ndi vutolo pomwe ma guarded onse akulumpha. Izi zimatsimikizira kuti ogwiritsa ntchito amalandira yankho nthawi zonse.

handlers.cc2: ctx.mawu a /echo moni dziko → "/echo moni dziko"
handlers.p1: Vortex malamulo amayamba ndi /. Match iwo ndi:
handlers.p3: Mutha kufotokozera othandizira ambiri momwe mungafunire. Amathamanga paokha:
handlers.p4: Malamulo angaphatikizepo mikangano. Uthenga wathunthu (command + args) ukupezeka kudzera pa ctx.text:
handlers.p5: Pamene othandizira angapo atha match, amawunikidwa mu dongosolo lomwe alembedwera. Woyamba match wapambana. Chogwirizira on msg chimakhala chomaliza ngati chobwerera.
handlers.td10: Chochitika chilichonse, posatengera mtundu wanji — catch-zobwerera zonse

if.p1: Zoyenera kuchita: yendetsani ma code osiyanasiyana kutengera momwe mulili.
if.p2: Gwiritsani ntchito elif panthambi zingapo. Nthambi yoyamba yokha matching ndiyomwe imayendetsa:
if.p3: Kuyika zisa zakuya kumapangitsa kuti code ikhale yovuta kuwerenga. Kukonda return koyambirira kuti muphwanye nthambi:
if.p4: Mawu aliwonse omwe amayesa bool amagwira ntchito ngati chikhalidwe:

intro.li1: Yowerengeka — khodi imawerengedwa ngati cholinga, osati makina
intro.li2: Safe — mitundu yokhazikika catch zolakwika nthawi isanakwane
intro.li3: Expressive — flows, guards, ndi mapatani matching ndi zomangidwa mkati
intro.li4: Minimal - palibe makalasi, palibe cholowa, palibe ndondomeko zoti muphunzire
intro.p1: Gravitix ndi chilankhulo chodziwika ndi domain (DSL) chopangidwa kuchokera pansi mpaka pansi kuti chilembedwe Vortex bots. Kumene zilankhulo zina zimafuna malaibulale, ma callbacks, ndi boilerplate, Gravitix zimakupatsirani zowongolera zochitika zapamwamba, zokambirana flows, ndi zomangidwa state — zonse mu mawu oyera, owerengeka owuziridwa ndi Rust.
intro.p2: Gravitix ndi ya aliyense amene akufuna kupanga Vortex bot mwachangu - kaya simunalembepo, kapena ndinu katswiri wodziwa ntchito yemwe watopa ndi Python boilerplate. Bukuli limaphunzitsa Gravitix kuchokera ku mfundo zoyamba: palibe zomwe zidachitika kale.
intro.p3: Gawo lirilonse limamanga pa zam'mbuyo. Ngati ndinu watsopano ku mapulogalamu, werengani kuchokera pamwamba mpaka pansi. Ngati mumadziwa kale chinenero china, gwiritsani ntchito mndandanda wa zomwe zili mkati kuti mudumphire pazomwe zimakukondani.
intro.p4: Munthawi yonseyi, → amatanthauza "kuyesa ku" kapena "kupanga", ndipo // ... akutanthauza ndemanga zomwe sizimanyalanyazidwa ndi wolemba.

loops.p3: Onetsetsani kuti zikhala false, kapena gwiritsani ntchito break kutuluka. Nthawi yothamanga imateteza ku malupu opanda malire omwe ali ndi malire.
loops.p4: Werengani zambiri pa every zinthu pamndandanda:
loops.p5: Gwiritsani ntchito range(start, end) kuzungulira ndi nambala:

match.p1: _ ndiye wildcard - matchchilichonse chomwe sichinakhale match mikono yam'mbuyomu.
match.p2: Match motsutsana ndi mawu okhazikika ndi /pattern/flags:
match.p3: Gwiritsani ntchito chipika { ... } mukafuna zoposa chimodzi statement:

math_calculus.cc10: Dera la semicircle yokhala ndi radius 1: iyenera kukhala π/2
math_calculus.cc11: Mtengo woyembekezeredwa: E[X] = ∫ x·p(x) dx pamagawidwe wamba
math_calculus.cc14: Mndandanda wa Taylor wa e^x kuzungulira x=0: 1 + x + x²/2! + x³/3! +...
math_calculus.cc16: Njira ya Newton: x₁ = x₀ − f(x₀)/f'(x₀)
math_calculus.cc2: Chochokera chachiwiri cha x² ndi 2 (kupindika kosalekeza)
math_calculus.p1: The derivative f'(x) imayesa kuchuluka kwa f kusintha pa mfundo x. Geometrically ndi malo otsetsereka a tangent mzere. Gravitix imagwiritsa ntchito kusiyana kwapakati pazochokera koyamba (zolakwika O(h²)) ndi formula ya dongosolo lachiwiri pazotengera zachiwiri.
math_calculus.p2: An integral ∫f(x)dx kuchokera ku mpaka b ndi malo omwe ali pansi pa piritsi. Gravitix imapereka njira zitatu zolondola kwambiri:
math_calculus.td17: Chidule cha Σ f(k) cha k = kuchokera..to
math_calculus.td18: Chogulitsa Π f(k) cha k = kuchokera..to

math_complex.cc1: Kuzungulira mfundo ndi ngodya theta mu 2D
math_complex.cc10: (−1) ^(1/3) ili ndi mizu ya cube itatu mu ndege yovuta
math_complex.cc3: Sinthani (1, 0) ndi madigiri 90 = π/2 ma radian
math_complex.cc4: Mizu ya umodzi: n-th mizu ya 1 ndi e^(2πik/n) ya k=0..n-1
math_complex.cc6: Kusintha kwa Möbius kumapanga mabwalo/mizere kupita ku mabwalo/mizere
math_complex.cc8: ndi=1,b=0,c=0,d=1 ichi ndi chizindikiro: w = z
math_complex.li2: Mkangano arg(z) = atan2(b, a) — ngodya yochokera ku mulingo weniweni
math_complex.p1: Nambala iliyonse yovuta z = a + bi imatha kuwonedwa ngati mfundo (a, b) pa ndege ya Argand. Mzere wopingasa ndiye gwero lenileni, choyimirira ndi mlongoti wongoganizira.
math_complex.p2: Chimodzi mwazinthu zofunika kwambiri pa masamu: e^(ix) = cos x + i·sin x. Izi zikutanthawuza kuti bwalo la unit mu ndege yovutayi ndi parametrized ndi ngodya x.
math_complex.p3: Ma exponential, sine, cosine, ndi logarithm amawonjezedwa ku ndege yonse yovuta. Mndandanda wawo wa Taylor umasinthira everypomwe (kapena pa disk ya log).
math_complex.p4: Kwa zovuta z ndi w, z^w = e^(w·ln z). Izi zimalola ma exponents osawerengeka komanso ovuta, kuwulula kulumikizana modabwitsa:
math_complex.td12: Amapanga z^n kukhala ma exponents ovuta
math_complex.td4: Nthambi yayikulu; osapitirira pa negative real axis

math_core.cc1: Lamulo la ma cosines: c² = a² + b² − 2ab·cos(C)
math_core.p1: Ntchito zonse zoyambira zimayembekezera ma angles mu radians. Gwiritsani ntchito radians(deg) kusintha kuchokera ku madigiri.
math_core.td17: Tangent = sin/cos. Osafotokozedwa pa π/2 + nπ
math_core.td21: Ngongole ya ivekita (x,y) kuchokera ku x-axis yabwino. Mulingo (−π, π]. Zonyamula x=0.
math_core.td22: Ma hyperbolic function: sinh(x)=(eˣ−e⁻ˣ)/2, ndi zina zotero.
math_core.td24: Sinthani ma radiya kukhala madigirii: r × 180/π
math_core.td25: Sinthani madigiri kukhala ma radiya: d × π/180
math_core.td26: Chipika chachilengedwe (base e). ln(e) = 1, ln(1) = 0. Domain x > 0.
math_core.td27: Chipika cha binary. log₂(1024) = 10. Chiwerengero cha zidutswa zofunika.
math_core.td28: Common log. log₁₀(1000) = 3. Dongosolo la ukulu.
math_core.td34: Kuzungulira mpaka nambala yapafupi kwambiri (theka kutali ndi ziro)
math_core.td39: Zowona ngati |a−b| < eps (zosasinthika 1e-9). Safe float kufananitsa.
math_core.td4: Nambala ya Euler, maziko a logarithm yachilengedwe
math_core.td45: Kumasulira kwa mzere: a + t·(b−a). t=0→a,t=1→b
math_core.td46: Mapu x kuchokera ku [a,b] kupita ku [c,d]

math_linalg.cc1: Ngongole pakati pa ma vector awiri
math_linalg.p1: Vector ndi mndandanda wa manambala osankhidwa. Itha kuyimira malo, mayendedwe, liwiro, kapena mawonekedwe mu ML.
math_linalg.p2: Matrix ndi mndandanda wa manambala a 2D. Matrix a mx n ali ndi mizere ya m ndi n mizati. Matrix ntchito zimapanga maziko a masinthidwe amzere.
math_linalg.td1: Madontho: Σ aᵢ·bᵢ. Zotsatira zake ndi scalar. dontho(a,b) = |a||b|cos θ
math_linalg.td10: Matrix kuchulukitsa (A ndi m×k, B ndi k×n → zotsatira m×n)
math_linalg.td11: Chulukitsani every chinthu ndi scalar s
math_linalg.td12: Sinthanitsani mizere ndi mizati: Aᵀ[i][j] = A[j][i]
math_linalg.td14: Matrix osinthika A⁻¹ moti A·A⁻¹ = Ine (Gauss-Jordan)
math_linalg.td19: Konzani mzere wa mzere Ax = b kudzera pakuchotsa kwa Gaussian
math_linalg.td2: Zogulitsa zamitundu iwiri ya 3D. Zotsatira ⊥ zolowetsa zonse. |a×b| = |a||b|chimo θ
math_linalg.td7: Chulukitsani chinthu chilichonse ndi scalar s

math_numth.cc4: Goldbach conjecture checker: every even n>2 ndi kuchuluka kwa ma primes awiri
math_numth.td1: Wogawanitsa wamkulu kwambiri kudzera pa algorithm ya Euclidean. gcd(12,8)=4
math_numth.td13: Njira zosankha k kuchokera ku n
math_numth.td19: Kuchulukitsa manambala amtundu wachiwiri: magawo a n kukhala k magawo opanda kanthu
math_numth.td21: Manambala achi Catalan: kutsatizana kwa mabulaketi, mitengo ya binary
math_numth.td25: Nambala za Bernoulli (zikuwoneka mu mndandanda wa Taylor wa trig/log)
math_numth.td3: Zogawa zonse zabwino za n, zosankhidwa. zigawo(12)=[1,2,3,4,6,12]
math_numth.td4: Euler's totient φ(n): chiwerengero cha manambala mu [1,n] coprime mpaka n
math_numth.td5: Zosintha modula: x kotero kuti a·x ≡ 1 (mod m). Zogwiritsidwa ntchito mu RSA.
math_numth.td6: Kufotokozera mwachangu modular: base^exp mod. O (log exp).
math_numth.td8: Zoyambira zonse mpaka n kudzera pa Sieve of Eratosthenes

math_special.cc12: Mzere wa ellipse wokhala ndi semi-ax a, b:
math_special.cc2: P(−σ < X < σ) kuti igawidwe bwino
math_special.cc3: Apéry's constant: ζ(3) ndiyopanda nzeru koma palibe mawonekedwe otsekedwa omwe amadziwika
math_special.cc4: J₀(x): oscillates ndi kuwonongeka - amafotokoza mafunde a radial
math_special.cc5: Y₀(x): imapatukana pa x=0, oscillates pa x
math_special.cc6: Ai amawola mochulukira chifukwa cha x→+∞, oscillates a x→-∞
math_special.cc9: Nthawi ya pendulum yokhala ndi matalikidwe θ₀:
math_special.p1: Ntchito ya Gamma Γ(n) ndikuphatikiza kosalekeza kwa factorial: Γ(n) = (n−1)! kwa manambala abwino. Imafikira manambala enieni komanso ovuta.
math_special.p2: Vuto la zolakwika erf(x) = (2/√π)∫₀ˣ e^(−t²)dt ndi gawo la Gaussian. Imakhudzana mwachindunji ndi CDF yodziwika bwino ndipo imawoneka m'magawo a kutentha ndi chiphunzitso cha kuthekera.
math_special.p3: ζ(s) = Σ 1/nˢ kwa n=1,2,3,… (pamene Re(zi)>1). Imalumikizana ndi kugawa koyambirira kudzera pamtundu wa Euler. Lingaliro la Riemann Hypothesis (losanathe!) limakhudza ziro za ζ mu ndege yovuta.
math_special.p4: Ntchito za Bessel Jₙ(x) ndi Yₙ(x) ndi njira zothetsera kusiyana kwa equation ya Bessel: x²y'' + xy' + (x²−n²)y = 0. Amawoneka pofalitsa mafunde, kutentha kwa masilinda, ndi quantum mechanics.
math_special.p5: Ai(x) ndi Bi(x) ndi njira zothetsera y'' = xy. Amawoneka mu quantum tunneling (WKB pafupifupi) ndi optics (diffraction).
math_special.p6: Mabanja a polynomial awa amakhala ngati eigenfunctions of opareshoni ofunikira ndipo amagwiritsidwa ntchito munjira zowonera, quadrature, ndi quantum mechanics.
math_special.p7: K(k) ndi E(k) ndi zophatikizika zamtundu woyamba ndi wachiwiri. Amawerengera nthawi ya pendulum yopanda mzere komanso kuzungulira kwa ellipse.
math_special.td5: Pₙ(x): orthogonal pa [-1,1]. Angular gawo la hydrogen wavefunctions.
math_special.td6: Hₙ(x): orthogonal w.r.t. e^(−x²). Quantum harmonic oscillator.
math_special.td8: Lₙ(x): orthogonal pa [0,∞) w.r.t. ndi^(−x). Hydrogen radial wavefunctions.

math_stats.cc2: Ndi kagawo kakang'ono ka anthu komwe kafika pansi pa 600 pa SAT (μ=500, σ=100)?
math_stats.cc3: Kuthekera kwa mitu 3 ndendende pama 10 abwino amapindika
math_stats.cc4: Avereji yamakasitomala awiri/mphindi, kuthekera kwa 5 ndendende mphindi imodzi?
math_stats.li1: r = 1: ubale wabwino kwambiri (pamene X akukula, Y amakula molingana)
math_stats.p1: Poganizira mndandanda wa manambala, magwiridwe antchitowa akufotokozera mwachidule zomwe zimachitika pakati pa data ndikufalikira:
math_stats.p2: Covariance cov(X,Y) = E[(X−μₓ)(Y−μᵧ)] amayesa ngati mitundu iwiri imayenda limodzi. Correlation r = cov(X,Y)/(σₓ·σᵧ) amasintha izi kukhala [-1, 1]:
math_stats.p3: linreg(xs, ys) ikukwanira pamzere wabwino kwambiri y = a + bx kudutsa ma data pogwiritsa ntchito mabwalo ang'onoang'ono. Kubwerera [slope, intercept, r_squared].
math_stats.td11: CDF: P(X ≤ x) kuti igawidwe bwino. Imagwiritsa ntchito kuyerekezera kwa erf.
math_stats.td12: P(X=k) = e^(−λ)·λᵏ/k! kwa kugawa kwa Poisson
math_stats.td15: Zitsanzo kuchokera ku N(μ,σ) pogwiritsa ntchito Box-Muller kusintha
math_stats.td3: Mtengo wapakati ukasankhidwa. Kwa ngakhale n, avareji yamitundu iwiri yapakati.
math_stats.td5: Avereji yapatuka kokwerera pakati kuchokera ku tanthauzo: Σ(xᵢ−μ)²/n
math_stats.td6: Kupatuka kokhazikika: √kusiyana. Mayunitsi ofanana ndi data.
math_stats.td8: Sinthani kukhala ziro kusiyana kwa mayunitsi: (xᵢ−μ)/σ

math_transforms.cc1: Phatikizani chizindikiro: kuchuluka kwa 440Hz ndi 880Hz sine mafunde
math_transforms.cc10: Pezani pafupipafupi zomwe zimaperekedwa ndi ogwiritsa ntchito
math_transforms.cc11: Zosefera za Low-pass: zero out high-frequency bins
math_transforms.cc2: (mulingo wachitsanzo = 8 zitsanzo za chiwonetsero, kugwiritsa ntchito kwenikweni kungakhale 44100)
math_transforms.cc5: Onani kukula kwa bin iliyonse yama frequency
math_transforms.cc6: Convolution: gwiritsani ntchito fyuluta yamabokosi (avareji yosuntha) kuti muzitha kusuntha
math_transforms.cc8: Ulendo wobwerera: fft → ifft iyenera kuyambiranso
math_transforms.cc9: adachira ≈ chizindikiro (mkati mwa float kulondola kwa mfundo)
math_transforms.li3: FFT imawerengera zotsatira zomwezo monga DFT koma mu O(n log n) vs O(n²) - ya n=1024 ndiyo ntchito 1024 motsutsana ndi 1 miliyoni
math_transforms.p1: Potengera kutsatizana kwa zitsanzo za N x[0], x[1], …, x[N−1], Discrete Fourier Transform imapanga zigawo za N complex frequency X[k]:
math_transforms.p2: MP3 ndi AAC kukanikizidwa kwamawu, JPEG kukanikizana kwa zithunzi, kutumiza opanda zingwe kwa 5G, kukonza ma siginolo a radar, ndi MRI kukonzanso zithunzistruction zonse zimadalira FFT algorithm. Kuzimvetsetsa kumakupatsani chidziwitso pazambiri zamakono zamakono.
math_transforms.td1: Fast Fourier Transform (Cooley-Tukey). xs: mndandanda wa floats kapena zovuta. Kubweza mndandanda wa zovuta. Zabwino kwa N = mphamvu ya 2.
math_transforms.td2: Zosiyana FFT. Reconstructs siginecha yanthawi yanthawi kuchokera ku sipekitiramu.
math_transforms.td3: Naive O(n²) DFT. Zotsatira zofanana ndi fft, zimagwira ntchito kwa N.
math_transforms.td4: Kusintha: (a★b)[n] = Σₖ a[k]·b[n−k]. Amagwiritsidwa ntchito muzosefera za FIR.
math_transforms.td5: Unikani Laplace kusintha polynomial pa zovuta s

operators.p4: Gwiritsani ntchito mabatani kuti muchotse: (a + b) * c.

pipe.cc2: Ndi pipe - amawerenga kumanzere kupita kumanja:
pipe.cc3: Zofanana ndi: trim(zolemba zing'onozing'ono(" HELLO WORLD "))
pipe.cc5: Pangani ndi kutumiza mu unyolo umodzi
pipe.cc6: split(chingwe, cholekanitsa) - chingwe ndi piped mkati
pipe.cc7: sintha (chingwe, kuchokera, kupita) - chingwe ndi piped mkati
pipe.p1: Ntchito ikafuna mkangano wopitilira umodzi, mtengo wa piped umakhala first mkangano ndipo enawo amapita mmakolo:

quickstart.li1: on /start { ... } - imatanthawuza chogwirizira chomwe chimagwira wogwiritsa ntchito akatumiza /start
quickstart.li3: {ctx.first_name} - imamasulira dzina loyamba la wogwiritsa ntchito mu chingwe
quickstart.p2: Pa Gravitix IDE, dinani Thamangani ▶ batani pamwamba. Lowetsani Vortex Bot Token yanu mukafunsidwa. Bot imayamba nthawi yomweyo - palibe sitepe yomanga yofunika.
quickstart.p3: Pulojekiti ya Gravitix ndi chikwatu chimodzi chomwe chili ndi mafayilo .grav. Malo olowera nthawi zonse ndi fayilo yomwe mumasankha kuyendetsa.
quickstart.p4: state { ... } imalengeza zosinthika zomwe zimapitilira mauthenga onse. Timaphimba izi mozama mu gawo la State Management.

schedule.cc1: bwererani kauntala ya tsiku ndi tsiku
schedule.h3: pa - kuthamanga pa nthawi yeniyeni ya tsiku
schedule.p1: Nthawi mu at ili mu UTC. Ngati owerenga anu ali m'gawo lina la nthawi, sinthani moyenerera (monga UTC+3 ogwiritsa ntchito: gwiritsani ntchito "06:00" kwa 9 AM yapafupi).

state.p1: Gwiritsani ntchito chipika cha state { } pamwamba pa fayilo yanu:
state.p2: Munda uliwonse uli ndi dzina, mtundu, ndi mtengo wosasinthika (womwe umagwiritsidwa ntchito bot ikayamba).
state.p3: State zikhalidwe zimapulumuka pakati pa mauthenga ndi pakati pa kuyambiranso kwa bot. Iwo amasungidwa pa litayamba basi.
state.p4: Gwiritsani ntchito state.fieldname kulikonse mu khodi yanu:
state.p5: Mamapu mu state ndi abwino kwa aliyense wogwiritsa ntchito:

strings.cc17: Njira yopangira unyolo imawerengedwa mwachilengedwe kumanzere kupita kumanja:
strings.p1: Lembani chingwe pakati pa mawu awiri:
strings.p2: Ikani mawu aliwonse mkati mwa {} mkati mwa chingwe:
strings.p3: Mutha kuyika mawu aliwonse ovomerezeka mkati { } - kuyimba ntchito, masamu, mafananidwe. Palibe malire pazovuta.
strings.p4: Gwiritsani ntchito mawu obwereza katatu """...""" pazingwe zomwe zimakhala ndi mizere ingapo:
strings.p5: Zingwe zotchulidwa katatu zimasunga zoyera zonse ndi mizere yatsopano monga momwe zalembedwera. Kutanthauzira {} kumagwira ntchito mkati mwawo chimodzimodzi.
strings.p6: Mutha kuyimbira zingwe zambiri pogwiritsa ntchito madontho - masitaelo onse ndi ofanana:

structs.p1: Gwiritsani ntchito impl TypeName { ... } kulumikiza njira ku struct. Mkati mwa njira, self amatanthauza chitsanzo.
structs.p2: Enums fotokozani mtundu womwe ungakhale ndendende umodzi mwamitundu ingapo. Zosintha zimatha kukhala zomveka (monga zokhazikika) kapena kunyamula deta.

syntax.cc2: Chingwe chotanthauzira - {expression} chasinthidwa ndi mtengo wake
syntax.li2: emit <value> - tumizani uthenga; mtengo ndi chingwe, kusintha, kapena mawu aliwonse
syntax.li3: Mizere ingapo emit → mauthenga angapo osiyana kwa wogwiritsa ntchito
syntax.li4: Zothandizira zingapo zoyambitsa zomwezo → zoyang'ana pamwamba mpaka pansi, choyamba match kupambana
syntax.p1: Choyambitsa chimauza bot liti kuyendetsa thupi lothandizira:
syntax.p2: emit imatumiza uthenga kwa wogwiritsa ntchito. Pambuyo pake mumayika mtengo wotumiza:
syntax.p3: Iliyonse emit imatumiza uthenga wosiyana. Iwo amafika mmodzi ndi mzake:
syntax.p4: Mutha kulemba angapo on /command othandizira. Amawunikiridwa mwadongosolo - woyamba yemwe guard amadutsa. Onani Guard Clauses kuti mumve zambiri.
syntax.td10: Chingwe chokhala ndi mtengo wapano state
syntax.td9: Mawu omwe ali ndi dzina la wogwiritsa ayikapo

types.cc9: State gawo lomwe limayamba null mpaka kuperekedwa
types.p1: Nambala yosainidwa ya 64-bit. Imathandizira kuyambira pafupifupi −9.2 × 10¹⁸ mpaka +9.2 × 10¹⁸.
types.p10: Mfundo zina sizingakhalepo. Malo osasankha mu ctx (monga ctx.username) akhoza kukhala null. Yang'anani nthawi zonse musanagwiritse ntchito:
types.p11: Powonjezera ? pambuyo pa mtundu walemba kuti optional - mtengo ukhoza kukhala null. Umu ndi momwe magawo amagwirira ntchito ndi state minda imafotokozera "izi zitha kukhalapo kapena sizingakhalepo":
types.p12: Ngati mtengo sungakhalepo nthawi zonse, fotokozerani T? ndipo nthawi zonse fufuzani != null musanagwiritse ntchito. Kupeza gawo la null sikugwetsa bot - returns null mwakachetechete.
types.p3: 10 / 3 yokhala ndi int mikhalidwe iwiri imapereka 3 (yodulidwa). Gwiritsani ntchito 10.0 / 3.0 pazotsatira za decimal.
types.p4: Ili ndi zikhalidwe ziwiri ndendende: true ndi false.
types.p5: Chingwe cholemba cha Unicode. Zingwe ndi zikhalidwe zosasinthika.
types.p6: Mndandanda wamtengo wapatali, zonse zamtundu womwewo T.
types.p7: Kupeza mlozera wakutali (mwachitsanzo, nums[99] pomwe mndandanda uli ndi zinthu 5) returns null m'malo mowononga bot yanu.
types.p8: Kutolere kwa magulu awiri amtengo wapatali. Makiyi onse akhale amtundu wofanana, zikhalidwe zonse zikhale zamtundu womwewo.
types.p9: Mtundu wa return wa magwiridwe antchito omwe alibe return mtengo. Nthawi zambiri simumalemba void mosapita m'mbali - ndiyosakhazikika pomwe palibe mtundu wa return watchulidwa.

variables.li1: Ayenera kuyamba ndi chilembo kapena pansi: name, _temp
variables.li2: Itha kukhala ndi zilembo, manambala, zinsinsi: user_count, page2
variables.p1: Zosintha zimasunga zomwe mungagwiritse ntchito ndikusintha pulogalamu yanu yonse.
variables.p3: Wophatikiza amatengera mtundu kuchokera pamtengo womwe uli kudzanja lamanja. Simuyenera kulemba mtunduwo mwatsatanetsatane - koma inu can.
variables.p4: Onjezani : TypeName pambuyo pa dzina losinthika:
variables.p5: Zofotokozera ndizosankha - zigwiritseni ntchito ngati mtunduwo sukuwonekera pamtengo wake, kapena mukafuna kuti code ikhale self-zolemba.
variables.p6: Zosintha zimasinthidwa mwachisawawa. Perekani mtengo watsopano ndi =:
variables.p8: Zosintha zilipo mkati mwa chipikacho { } zomwe zalengezedwamo. Siziwoneka kunja kwa midadadayo:

wizard.title: Kupanga Node
wizard.nodeDesc: Khazikitsani dzina la chipangizocho ndi doko. Izi zitha kuwoneka ndi ma node ena pa netiweki yakomweko.
wizard.deviceNameHint: Zowoneka ndi ma node ena pa netiweki.
wizard.networkDesc: Sankhani momwe node yanu idzagwirira ntchito.
wizard.netLocalDesc: Wi-Fi / LAN. Imagwira ntchito popanda intaneti. Zipangizo zimapezana zokha.
wizard.netGlobalDesc: Kudzera pa intaneti. Cloudflare Tunnel + kusokoneza magalimoto. Access from anywhere in the world.
wizard.cfNotFound: cloudflared sanapezeke. Ikani kuti mutsegule mawonekedwe apadziko lonse lapansi.
wizard.inviteNote: Gawani ndi anthu omwe mumawakhulupirira okha
wizard.sslDesc: Sankhani momwe mungapezere satifiketi ya HTTPS. Yalangizidwa kuti mugwiritse ntchito msakatuli wonse (maikolofoni, kamera, WebRTC).
wizard.sslSelfDesc: Zopangidwa zokha, zimagwira ntchito LAN popanda intaneti
wizard.sslMkcertDesc: Wodalirika kwathunthu, palibe machenjezo a msakatuli
wizard.sslLeDesc: Satifiketi yodalirika yaulere. Imafunika domain ndi port 80.
wizard.sslNoneDesc: HTTP kokha. Zina mwa msakatuli mwina sizikupezeka.
wizard.adminPasswordHint: Zofunikira pakuyika CA mu sitolo yodalirika. Mawu achinsinsi amagwiritsidwa ntchito kamodzi osasungidwa.
wizard.mkcertInfo: mkcert imapanga ziphaso zodalirika kwanuko popanda machenjezo a msakatuli. Zaulere kwathunthu, zimagwira ntchito popanda intaneti.
wizard.domainHint: Domain ikuyenera kuloza ku seva iyi IP
wizard.stagingHint: Sigwiritsa ntchito LE malire a mitengo, satifiketi siidalirika
wizard.noSslWarning: Without HTTPS: microphone/camera for calls, notifications, geolocation will be unavailable. Asakatuli ena amaletsa WebSocket popanda SSL.
wizard.authDesc: Konzani njira zolowera kwa ogwiritsa ntchito node yanu. Mutha kudumpha izi ndikuziwonjezera pambuyo pake pazokonda.
wizard.passkeysDesc: Lowani kudzera pa biometrics, Touch ID kapena PIN. Palibe ntchito zakunja zofunika - zimagwira ntchito kudzera pa msakatuli/OS.
wizard.reviewDesc: Zonse zikuwoneka bwino? Zokonda zidzasungidwa ku fayilo ya .env pambuyo poyambitsa.
wizard.launchedDesc: Kukhazikitsa wizard kwatha. Kutsegula mawonekedwe akuluakulu...
wizard.genCaCert: Kupanga CA ndi satifiketi ya seva...
wizard.enterAdminPassword: Lowetsani mawu achinsinsi otsogolera kuti muyike CA
wizard.caInstalled: CA yoyikidwa mu sitolo yodalirika - yambitsanso msakatuli wanu
wizard.sslSkipped: SSL adalumpha. Node idzayenda pa HTTP.

onboarding.step1Text: Dinani apa kuti mupange malo atsopano ochezera
onboarding.step2Text: Gawani khodi iyi ndi anzanu kuti muwayitanire
onboarding.step3Text: Lembani uthenga wanu woyamba ndikugunda Enter
onboarding.step4Text: Mauthenga onse ndi obisidwa - ndi inu nokha ndi wolandira omwe mungawawerenge
onboarding.step5Text: Onani Vortex — pangani zipinda, onjezani olumikizana nawo, sinthani makonda anu

permissions.customHint: Chotsani zilolezo za membalayu. Izi zimagwira ntchito mosasamala kanthu za udindo wawo.
permissions.canSendMediaDesc: Mutha kutumiza zithunzi, makanema, ndi mafayilo
permissions.canSendStickersDesc: Itha kutumiza zomata, ma GIF, ndi mapaketi a emoji
permissions.canSendLinksDesc: Itha kutumiza mauthenga okhala ndi ma URL
permissions.canDeleteOthersDesc: Itha kufufuta mauthenga ochokera kwa mamembala ena
permissions.canChangeInfoDesc: Itha kusintha dzina lachipinda, mafotokozedwe, ndi avatar
permissions.canManageCallsDesc: Itha kuyambitsa, kuletsa, ndi kukonza mafoni amagulu
